source: src/write_classification.rs SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS plus scalar coverage/proof reports

rows.watchdogRequirement: production-capable watchdog plan must be armed before mutation; timeout restores the backup unless the user confirms the change
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk ecosystem/policy setting. Requires advanced opt-in and dead-man confirm-or-revert recovery; display/render, cursor/input, and debug/crash rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: production-capable watchdog plan must be armed before mutation; timeout restores the backup unless the user confirms the change
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk ecosystem/policy setting. Requires advanced opt-in and dead-man confirm-or-revert recovery; display/render, cursor/input, and debug/crash rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: production-capable watchdog plan must be armed before mutation; timeout restores the backup unless the user confirms the change
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk ecosystem/policy setting. Requires advanced opt-in and dead-man confirm-or-revert recovery; display/render, cursor/input, and debug/crash rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: display/render watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk display/render XWayland scaling setting. Only the approved scaling policy smoke subset is writable; XWayland enable/socket, render, cursor/input, and debug/crash rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: display/render watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk display/render XWayland scaling setting. Only the approved scaling policy smoke subset is writable; XWayland enable/socket, render, cursor/input, and debug/crash rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: cursor/input watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup; recovery must not depend on mouse input, visible cursor, app UI, Hyprland keybinds, pointer focus, workspace focus, or normal pointer behavior
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk cursor/input theme sync policy setting. Only the approved cursor theme sync smoke subset is writable; cursor visibility, hardware cursor, warping, zoom, and monitor-targeting rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: cursor visibility watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup; recovery must not depend on visible cursor, mouse input, app UI, Hyprland keybinds, pointer focus, workspace focus, or normal pointer behavior
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk cursor visibility policy setting. Cursor may disappear after touch, tablet, or keyboard-triggered input. Requires cursor-visibility warning and dead-man watchdog confirm-or-revert recovery; cursor.invisible, cursor.inactive_timeout, hardware cursor, warping, zoom, and monitor-targeting rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: cursor visibility watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup; recovery must not depend on visible cursor, mouse input, app UI, Hyprland keybinds, pointer focus, workspace focus, or normal pointer behavior
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk cursor visibility policy setting. Cursor may disappear after touch, tablet, or keyboard-triggered input. Requires cursor-visibility warning and dead-man watchdog confirm-or-revert recovery; cursor.invisible, cursor.inactive_timeout, hardware cursor, warping, zoom, and monitor-targeting rows remain blocked.

rows.watchdogRequirement: cursor visibility keyboard-trigger watchdog plan must be persisted and backup must exist before mutation; separate process confirm keeps the change, timeout restores the backup, wrong token fails, and real config is refused in dry-run tests; confirmation is represented as CLI token text input; recovery must not depend on visible cursor, mouse input, app UI, Hyprland keybinds, pointer focus, workspace focus, or normal pointer behavior
rows.uiReviewWarning: High-risk cursor visibility keyboard-trigger policy setting. Cursor may disappear while typing. Requires CLI token confirmation and dead-man watchdog confirm-or-revert recovery; cursor.invisible, cursor.inactive_timeout, hardware cursor, warping, zoom, and monitor-targeting rows remain blocked.

rows.recoveryStrategy: persisted high-risk recovery plan with backup, rollback, confirmation token, timeout rollback
